intro: Nephrodium rubrinerve, also known as the Red-stemmed Lady fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Nephrodium rubrinerve include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal effects.
